elytra_physics.configuration.title: Elytra Physics Config
elytra_physics.configuration.adaptive_gr: Whether elytra and cape physics are influenced by the players gravity.
elytra_physics.configuration.prevent_sna: Fixes the bug where capes (and now elytras) snap back to default position when moving at high speeds. This fix overwrites a method and could cause conflicts with other mods. [REQUIRES RESTART]
elytra_physics.configuration.gravity_mul: Affects the gravity applied to capes and elytras.
elytra_physics.configuration.elytra_lean: Affects how far back the elytra leans.
elytra_physics.configuration.elytra_spre: Affects how much the elytra spreads as you are moving.
